# Reviewing agent output

<!-- source: 05-github-copilot.qmd section "Why so much code?" +
     08-advanced-llm-agents.qmd (vibe coding paragraph) +
     13-ethics-copyright.qmd section "Who's responsible for mistakes?" -->

How to check what an agent actually did before you accept it, and why vibe coding is a bad fit for serious science.

::: {.callout-important title="Challenge" appearance="simple"}
TODO: challenge reading an agent-generated diff and finding one thing you'd change.
:::
